ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ineq1, ineq2, ineq3, ineq4, ineq5⟩
    have key : ∀ a b c : ℝ, 0 < a → 0 < b → 0 < c → (a^2 - c) * (b^2 - c) ≤ 0 → 
               min (a^2) (b^2) ≤ c ∧ c ≤ max (a^2) (b^2) := by
      intros a b c ha hb hc hineq
      by_cases hab : a^2 ≤ b^2
      · simp only [min_eq_left hab, max_eq_right hab]
        constructor
        · by_contra h; push_neg at h
          have : a^2 - c > 0 := by linarith
          have : b^2 - c > 0 := by linarith [hab]
          nlinarith
        · by_contra h; push_neg at h
          have : a^2 - c < 0 := by linarith [hab]
          have : b^2 - c < 0 := by linarith
          nlinarith
      · push_neg at hab
        simp only [min_eq_right (le_of_lt hab), max_eq_left (le_of_lt hab)]
        constructor
        · by_contra h; push_neg at h
          have : a^2 - c > 0 := by linarith [hab]
          have : b^2 - c > 0 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        · by_contra h; push_neg at h
          have : a^2 - c < 0 := by linarith
          have : b^2 - c < 0 := by linarith [hab]
          nlinarith
    use x₁
    by_contra hne
    push_neg at hne
    rcases hne with ⟨_, _, _, _⟩ | ⟨_, _, _, _⟩ | ⟨_, _, _⟩ | ⟨_, _⟩ | ⟨_⟩ <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅, sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1, mul_pos h1 h3, mul_pos h2 h4, mul_pos h3 h5, mul_pos h4 h1, mul_pos h5 h2]
  · intro ⟨x, hx1, hx2, hx3, hx4, hx5⟩
    simp only [← hx1, ← hx2, ← hx3, ← hx4, ← hx5]
    constructor
    · exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith, by linarith, by linarith, by linarith⟩
    · simp only [sq, sub_self, mul_zero, le_refl, and_self]

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ⟨ineq1, ineq2, ineq3, ineq4, ineq5⟩⟩
    have key : ∀ a b c : ℝ, (a ^ 2 - c) * (b ^ 2 - c) ≤ 0 → min (a ^ 2) (b ^ 2) ≤ c ∧ c ≤ max (a ^ 2) (b ^ 2) ∨ 
               (a ^ 2 - c) * (b ^ 2 - c) = 0 := by
      intros a b c h
      by_cases ha : a ^ 2 = c
      · right; linarith [sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b]
      · by_cases hb : b ^ 2 = c
        · right; linarith [sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b]
        · left
          constructor
          · by_contra hmin
            push_neg at hmin
            have : a ^ 2 - c > 0 := by linarith [le_min_iff.mp (le_refl (min (a^2) (b^2)))]
            have : b ^ 2 - c > 0 := by linarith [le_min_iff.mp (le_refl (min (a^2) (b^2)))]
            nlinarith
          · by_contra hmax
            push_neg at hmax
            have : a ^ 2 - c < 0 := by linarith [le_max_left (a^2) (b^2)]
            have : b ^ 2 - c < 0 := by linarith [le_max_right (a^2) (b^2)]
            nlinarith
    use x₁
    constructor
    · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂,
                 sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₂)]
    constructor
    · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂,
                 sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₂)]
    constructor
    · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂,
                 sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₂)]
    · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂,
                 sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₂)]
  · intro ⟨x, hx1, hx2, hx3, hx4, hx5⟩
    simp only [← hx1, ← hx2, ← hx3, ← hx4, ← hx5]
    ring_nf
    simp

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ineq1, ineq2, ineq3, ineq4, ineq5⟩
    refine ⟨x₁, rfl, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), 
      sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃),
      sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅)]
  · intro ⟨x, hx1, hx2, hx3, hx4, hx5⟩
    simp only [hx1, hx2, hx3, hx4, hx5, sub_self, mul_zero, le_refl, and_self, and_true]

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, c1, c2, c3, c4, c5⟩
    have key : ∀ a b c : ℝ, 0 < a → 0 < b → 0 < c → (a^2 - b*c) * (c^2 - b*a) ≤ 0 → 
               (a^2 - b*c) * (c^2 - b*a) ≤ 0 := fun _ _ _ _ _ _ h => h
    -- The sum of products equals (x₁² - x₃x₅)(x₂² - x₃x₅) + ... ≤ 0
    -- But by AM-GM type argument, equality forces all equal
    have sum_eq : (x₁ - x₂)^2 + (x₂ - x₃)^2 + (x₃ - x₄)^2 + (x₄ - x₅)^2 + (x₅ - x₁)^2 ≥ 0 := by
      positivity
    -- Direct approach: use nlinarith
    use x₁
    constructor; rfl
    constructor; · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                             sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂,
                             sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                             sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                             sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅),
                             sq_nonneg (x₁*x₂ - x₃*x₄), sq_nonneg (x₁*x₃ - x₂*x₄),
                             mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1,
                             mul_pos h1 h3, mul_pos h2 h4, mul_pos h3 h5, mul_pos h4 h1, mul_pos h5 h2]
    constructor; · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                             sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃),
                             mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1]
    constructor; · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                             sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄),
                             mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
               sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅),
               mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1]
  · intro ⟨x, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩
    simp [mul_comm]

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ineq1, ineq2, ineq3, ineq4, ineq5⟩
    -- The sum of products of form (a² - c)(b² - c) where c = product of two others
    -- By AM-GM and the cyclic structure, equality holds only when all are equal
    have key : x₁ = x₂ ∧ x₂ = x₃ ∧ x₃ = x₄ ∧ x₄ = x₅ := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      -- Use nlinarith to derive contradiction from the inequalities
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁),
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅),
                 mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1,
                 mul_pos h1 h3, mul_pos h2 h4, mul_pos h3 h5, mul_pos h4 h1, mul_pos h5 h2,
                 mul_pos (mul_pos h1 h3) h5, mul_pos (mul_pos h2 h4) h1,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ * x₂ - x₃ * x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ * x₃ - x₄ * x₅)]
    exact ⟨x₁, rfl, key.1, key.2.1, key.2.2.1, key.2.2.2⟩
  · intro ⟨x, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩
    simp [mul_self_nonneg]
lf]

refine ⟨⟨by linarith, by linarith, by linarith, by linarith, by linarith⟩, ?_⟩
    constructor <;> ring_nf <;> linarith

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ineq1, ineq2, ineq3, ineq4, ineq5⟩
    -- The key insight: each inequality (a² - c)(b² - c) ≤ 0 means c is between a² and b²
    -- Adding all five inequalities in a clever way shows all must be equal
    by_contra hne
    push_neg at hne
    -- This requires careful analysis of the cyclic structure
    -- When all x_i are equal, all terms vanish
    -- Otherwise, we get a contradiction from the cyclic nature
    have key : x₁ = x₂ ∧ x₂ = x₃ ∧ x₃ = x₄ ∧ x₄ = x₅ := by
      -- Each inequality means the product ≤ 0, so one factor ≤ 0 and other ≥ 0
      -- This means x₃*x₅ is between x₁² and x₂², etc.
      -- By AM-GM and cyclic structure, equality must hold
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄),
                 sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁),
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅),
                 sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅),
                 mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1,
                 mul_pos h1 h3, mul_pos h2 h4, mul_pos h3 h5, mul_pos h4 h1, mul_pos h5 h2]
    exact ⟨x₁, rfl, key.1, key.1.trans key.2.1, key.1.trans (key.2.1.trans key.2.2.1),
           key.1.trans (key.2.1.trans (key.2.2.1.trans key.2.2.2))⟩
  · intro ⟨x, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩
    simp [mul_self_nonneg]

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, c1, c2, c3, c4, c5⟩
    have key : ∀ a b c : ℝ, 0 < a → 0 < b → 0 < c → (a^2 - c) * (b^2 - c) ≤ 0 → 
               min (a^2) (b^2) ≤ c ∧ c ≤ max (a^2) (b^2) := by
      intros a b c ha hb hc h
      by_cases hab : a^2 ≤ b^2
      · simp only [min_eq_left hab, max_eq_right hab]
        constructor
        · by_contra hlt
          push_neg at hlt
          have : a^2 - c < 0 := by linarith
          have : b^2 - c < 0 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        · by_contra hgt
          push_neg at hgt
          have : a^2 - c > 0 := by linarith
          have : b^2 - c > 0 := by linarith
          nlinarith
      · push_neg at hab
        simp only [min_eq_right (le_of_lt hab), max_eq_left (le_of_lt hab)]
        constructor
        · by_contra hlt
          push_neg at hlt
          have : a^2 - c < 0 := by linarith
          have : b^2 - c < 0 := by linarith
          nlinarith
        · by_contra hgt
          push_neg at hgt
          have : a^2 - c > 0 := by linarith
          have : b^2 - c > 0 := by linarith
          nlinarith
    use x₁
    have eq1 : x₁ = x₂ := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅, sq_nonneg (x₁-x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₄-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅-x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₅)]
    have eq2 : x₂ = x₃ := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅, sq_nonneg (x₁-x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₄-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅-x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₅)]
    have eq3 : x₃ = x₄ := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅, sq_nonneg (x₁-x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₄-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅-x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₅)]
    have eq4 : x₄ = x₅ := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅, sq_nonneg (x₁-x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₄-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅-x₁), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂-x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃-x₅)]
    exact ⟨rfl, eq1, eq1.trans eq2, eq1.trans (eq2.trans eq3), eq1.trans (eq2.trans (eq3.trans eq4))⟩
  · intro ⟨x, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩
    constructor
    · exact ⟨x.2, x.2, x.2, x.2, x.2⟩
    · simp [mul_comm]

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ineq1, ineq2, ineq3, ineq4, ineq5⟩
    use x₁
    constructor; rfl
    constructor; nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅)]
    constructor; nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅)]
    constructor; nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅)]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅)]
  · intro ⟨x, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩
    constructor
    · exact ⟨x.2, x.2, x.2, x.2, x.2⟩
    · simp only [mul_self_nonneg, sub_self, mul_zero, le_refl, and_self]

ext ⟨x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, x₅⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩, ⟨c1, c2, c3, c4, c5⟩⟩
    -- The key insight: each condition (a-c)(b-c) ≤ 0 means c is between a and b
    -- Adding all 5 cyclic inequalities and using AM-GM style arguments shows all must be equal
    use x₁
    by_contra hne
    push_neg at hne
    -- This requires detailed analysis showing contradiction
    have key : ∀ a b c : ℝ, 0 < a → 0 < b → 0 < c → (a^2 - c) * (b^2 - c) ≤ 0 → 
               min a b ≤ Real.sqrt c ∧ Real.sqrt c ≤ max a b ∨ a^2 = c ∨ b^2 = c := by
      intro a b c ha hb hc hmul
      by_cases ha2 : a^2 = c
      · right; left; exact ha2
      by_cases hb2 : b^2 = c
      · right; right; exact hb2
      left
      have hne1 : a^2 - c ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr ha2
      have hne2 : b^2 - c ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hb2
      have : (a^2 - c) * (b^2 - c) < 0 := by
        cases' (hmul.lt_or_eq) with h h
        · exact h
        · exfalso; exact (mul_ne_zero hne1 hne2) h
      constructor <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, Real.sq_sqrt hc.le]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg x₁, sq_nonneg x₂, sq_nonneg x₃, sq_nonneg x₄, sq_nonneg x₅,
               sq_nonneg (x₁ - x₂), sq_nonneg (x₂ - x₃), sq_nonneg (x₃ - x₄), 
               sq_nonneg (x₄ - x₅), sq_nonneg (x₅ - x₁),
               mul_pos h1 h2, mul_pos h2 h3, mul_pos h3 h4, mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h1,
               mul_pos h1 h3, mul_pos h2 h4, mul_pos h3 h5, mul_pos h4 h1, mul_pos h5 h2]
  · intro ⟨x, hx⟩
    obtain ⟨rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl⟩ := hx
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg x]
